intro: BiBoEmployeeTracking uses the capabilities below. Status updates automatically.
restartNote: Some permissions require quitting & reopening the app to take effect.

accessibility.label: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Lets the app read the active window/app for activity tracking.

input_monitoring.label: Input Monitoring
input_monitoring.description: Lets the app count keystrokes (counts only — never which keys).

screen_recording.label: Screen Recording
screen_recording.description: Lets the app capture periodic screenshots.

keystrokes.label: Activity & keystroke counts
keystrokes.description: Tracks the active app/window and counts keystrokes (counts only — never which keys are pressed).

screenshots.label: Screenshots
screenshots.description: Captures periodic screenshots of your screen(s).
